headline: Hubbell to Acquire NSI Industries
summary: Shelton, CT, May 04, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Hubbell to Acquire NSI Industries A leading manufacturer of electrical fittings, connectors, components and wire management products serving industrial, infrastructure and commercial end marketsComplementary product offerings enhance Hubbell’s Electrical Solutions portfolioAttractive financial profile expected to be accretive to Hubbell and HES adjusted operating margins and long-term organic growth$3.0 billion transaction to be financed with cash on
